data_source_note: Web search 422 & web_fetch blocked. Reused latest available data from 19:11 CST run.

x_search_trump_iran.author: @ConciousLabRat
x_search_trump_iran.content: Markets open → Trump floods feed with 'potential deal' headlines. Markets close → threats of bombing Iran 'back to the stone age' or hitting power plants if Strait of Hormuz stays shut. This seesaw has dragged on for over a month.

x_search_trump_iran.author: @madlife1000
x_search_trump_iran.content: Trump is the one begging for a deal. Iran said no deal.

x_search_trump_iran.author: @astronglady
x_search_trump_iran.content: I can't see why Iran would negotiate when Trump shows them no respect. What would make them think a compulsive lying narcissist would respect any deal?

x_search_trump_iran.author: @EzemFrancis
x_search_trump_iran.content: Iran says intelligence chief killed by US-Israeli strike, as Trump threatens 'hell' if deal not made

x_search_trump_iran.author: @KurdishDoctrine
x_search_trump_iran.content: Trump is playing a high-stakes game of coercive diplomacy. By floating the idea of arming ethnic minorities, he's trying to scare Iran into a compromise.

x_search_iran_ceasefire.author: @shedblood178
x_search_iran_ceasefire.content: Iran mediators reject temporary ceasefire after receiving new plan to end war (from independent.co.uk)

x_search_iran_ceasefire.author: @A_K_Mandhan
x_search_iran_ceasefire.content: While Pakistan was presenting its ceasefire proposal to Tehran, Israel was carrying out targeted strikes on key Iranian figures. Both happened overnight, between April 5 and 6.

x_search_iran_ceasefire.author: @mvwillo1610
x_search_iran_ceasefire.content: Iran will not agree to a temporary ceasefire, they need a permanent solution to US imperialism and destabilisation in their region.

x_search_iran_ceasefire.author: @Happyfeet23443
x_search_iran_ceasefire.content: Bomb Iran Saturday always turns into Ceasefire Monday. Every weekend is the same thing.

x_search_iran_ceasefire.author: @RuDauntless
x_search_iran_ceasefire.content: Iranian officials made clear to mediators they don't want to be caught in a Gaza or Lebanon situation where there is a ceasefire on paper, but the US and Israel can attack again whenever they want.

kobeissi_letter.author: @KobeissiLetter
kobeissi_letter.content: Oil prices crossing above $115 per barrel. Models indicate sustained 7 weeks leads to US CPI 3.7%, highest since September 2023.

kobeissi_letter.author: @KobeissiLetter
kobeissi_letter.content: BREAKING: US F-15E shot down over Iran. Two pilots aboard. Condition unknown. First US aircraft shot down by enemy fire in this conflict.

kobeissi_letter.author: @KobeissiLetter
kobeissi_letter.content: Middle East oil product exports -63% in March. Biggest decline in history.

kobeissi_letter.author: @KobeissiLetter
kobeissi_letter.content: Hedge funds sold world equities at fastest pace in 10 years. Short/long ratio 7.6:1. Fourth consecutive monthly sale.

kobeissi_letter.author: @KobeissiLetter
kobeissi_letter.content: Fed inflation expectations exceed 5%. US lost -133,000 jobs in Feb. Largest since Dec 2020.

kobeissi_letter.author: @KobeissiLetter
kobeissi_letter.content: CDS volume Q1 2026 surged +69% to $4.5 trillion. Highest on record. Exceeds Q2 2025 tariff turmoil levels.

watcher_guru.note: No recent Iran/Oil tweets found in earlier run
